The question is asking to determine the number of clerks who began their service before the year 1959. Since each row represents an individual clerk and the "started" column indicates the year they began their service, we need to look at the "started" column values to count clerks who began before 1959. We can use the f_filter_rows(started < 1959) operation to filter the clerks based on their start year to analyze this situation.

The question is asking to determine the number of clerks who started before 1959. To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "started" column, which is a date type, in the order of "small to large" using the f_sort_column(started) operation. This will allow us to see the clerks who started the earliest and identify those who began before 1959.

Explanation: The clerks who started before 1959 are Kenneth W. Dam (1957), Alan C. Kohn (1957), William C. Canby, Jr. (1958), and Heywood H. Davis (1958). All four clerks started before 1959. Therefore, the answer is 4.
